quote_of_day.text:
>>37964
Any fucking day British Raj >>>>> Islam
 See this >>37966

Anyone saying anything else is coping +british weren't so hard on Christianity imposing. Chuds here don't understand how good British were in that regard compared to Portuguese or Spanish or french
quote_of_day.name: Anon

articles.title: Weather on the board today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of caste recrimination moved over the board, bringing with it a cold snap of anti-sambandham sentiment. Anon criticized sambandham culture, blaming firangis for India's woes in a heated discussion.

A scattered fog of confusion rolled in with a query about 'pugchods' on Indiachan, sparking brief but intense debate.

Meanwhile, a drizzle of genetic determinism fell with discussions on the genetic merit of Bihari Rajput marriages and caste and genetic ancestry claims.

A weak front of Bollywood criticism pushed through, with Anon taking aim at the movie Dhurandhar. Overall, the board was overcast with argumentative threads, but no major storms developed.

articles.title: Anon Criticizes Sambandham Culture, Blames Firangis for India's Woes
articles.body:
Anon opened the discussion by calling something an 'abomination' and expressing amusement that followers of sambandham culture, whom they described as 'cuckiest,' fell for it.

They also made critical comments about Bengalis, suggesting they were the first to betray the subcontinent by being the first to be 'raaped by firangis.' Another anon responded, disagreeing with the original poster's focus on effects rather than causes.

This respondent argued that firangis killed many of the 'best Indian genes' during their wars and claimed they attempted to drain India's resources while subjecting its people to mass genocide.

A different anon countered the narrative about the Battle of Panipat, stating that Marathas had been battered but not defeated, and suggested that without British rule, Ottomans and other Middle Eastern Muslims would have attempted to raid India again.

They also posited that British Raj did irreparable damage to Christianity in Europe by introducing Hinduism and Buddhism. One respondent defended Bengalis, stating they were 'buckbroken by Islam' and mistakenly viewed British as firangis but not Muslims.

They also pointed out that North India was the first to fall to invaders and mentioned that Marwadi seths funded the British invasion of Bengal.

Another participant argued that British Raj was preferable to Islam and noted that British translated Hindu scriptures, which helped Christianity among European intellectuals. They also mentioned British assistance in recovering the gates of Somnath.

Anon also expressed support for creating a Brahmin network to promote pro-Brahmin policies and mentioned the need for a Brahmin-only gang to patrol and protect against mistreatment of lower castes.

The discussion included various perspectives on British rule, Islam, and Indian history, with some participants praising British Raj and others criticizing it. One respondent stated that British weren't hard on Christianity and imposed less than Portuguese, Spanish, or French.

The conversation also touched on communism, with one anon stating that any form of communism in government would ruin a country and expressing wonder why India is a 'shithole.'

articles.title: Anon questions presence of 'pugchods' on Indiachan
articles.body:
Anon opened a thread asking if there were any 'pugchods' on Indiachan and what was going on with them. The original post read 'Any pugchods here? Da hell is going on here pugchods? Apne ladke sambhal pehle phir ladkiyan dekhiyo.

Kek'. Another anon responded by referencing a past post and made a claim about 'pugchods' being involved with the East India Company and being present in World War I and II.

This anon stated that 'They were kikes during muslim rule in lundia. Traders merchants they were controlling everything wars and everything.they probably helped east india company for their profits.

No wonder too many khatri pugchods were in ww2/ww1 and got overseas uk citizen'. A respondent brought up the topic of Bollywood and media control, stating that 'Cucktris also control indian cinema and the media. Well well well'.

Another anon noted that '90% of khatris are hindu tho'. One participant expressed suspicion about a pattern of behavior among Khatris, with an anon stating 'The pattern is too frequent, something is wrong with these khatri baniyas'.

A respondent agreed, saying 'Exactly. Brahcucks arent that rich tbh. Khatris are always rich and involved in degeneratr shit. Most brahcucks are conservative. But khatris are progressive globo'.

Anon also discussed the supposed degeneracy of certain groups, with one stating 'They want to subvert hinduism and indian culture with thier woke degenerate shit, you can't ignore the parrent even if you have room tempreature IQ'.

articles.title: Anon Debates Genetic Merit of Bihari Rajput Marriage
articles.body:
Anon sparked a discussion on the genetic implications of marrying a Bihari Rajput, labeling it 'genetic suicide.' The original post prompted several responses criticizing the physical characteristics of a specific individual, suggesting that their genetic makeup could not be improved without surgery.

One anon noted the person's 'daysu broad flat nose' and 'shiski color' as major drawbacks, calling it 'a complete disaster.' Another anon defended the idea that wealth could fix genetic issues, stating that the family could afford surgeries to alter the individual's appearance.

However, others disagreed, with one stating that such fixes were not easily achievable, especially for someone 'deep into looksmaxxing.' The conversation also touched on caste and regional identities, with some anons referencing the individual's possible background and family.

One claimed the person was a Pahadi Brahmin, while another mentioned that her husband was from a similar background. Anon also joked about the individual's potential for 'kanging' and the perceived decline of certain groups' genetic quality.

The discussion remained focused on physical characteristics and genetic merit, with no clear consensus reached.

articles.title: Caste and Genetic Ancestry Claims
articles.body:
Anon started a thread with "Gujjara ke chhore 💪💪".

Anon responded with a claim about genetic ancestry, stating that as one moves west to north, the Steppe and AASI components decrease, while the IVC component increases.

Another Anon countered, calling some groups "illiterate incomprehensible dehaati tribal ape" and "jhaatfag." A respondent asserted that Jadeja Rajputs are Yadav larpers and more closely related to Ahirs.

Anon questioned the Varna system categorization of Jatts, calling them "low born scynthian rapebabies." Anon also claimed that northern Chamars have lower genetic components compared to northern upper castes.

A respondent disagreed, stating that genetic differences do not necessarily imply social hierarchy.

articles.title: Anon Criticizes Bollywood Movie Dhurandhar
articles.body:
Anon posted a list of complaints about an unnamed Bollywood movie, criticizing its plot, character names, and depiction of women. Another anon described the trailer, saying it depicts a Muslim character calling Hindus "darpook kaum" before being beaten by a Hindu.

One respondent called Yami Gautam "way out of his league," while another anon praised the Dogra community, saying they are one of the few Hindu groups with "spine left." Anon also discussed the movie's producers, speculating about their background and motives.
